notes.growth: Hard mode (CESI/PMI via TradingEconomics, optional) or proxy equity return differential
notes.positioning: CFTC COT with report_date/release_dt alignment (Friday release eligibility)
notes.rates: 2Y yield spread proxy (Stooq), sliced on-or-before as_of
notes.risk: SPX (Stooq) + VIX/Dollar index (FRED) regime tilt, computed as-of
